revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-730

The characteristic of a receiver which determines the minimum usable input i.e. the least input which produces an output which satisfies certain specified requirements, including generally a specified output together with a specified signal-to-noise ratio.

Reference: B.S.
